prompt_used: Create original premium horror artwork for a commercial alternate reality investigation game. Subject: clue artifact detail. Story world: Crown of Salt. Premise: A relic-smuggling cartel launders artifacts through a city that disappears at dawn tide.. Setting: Port authority archives and salt catacombs. Threat presence: The Salt Regent. Recurring motifs: salt crowns, wet ledgers, cargo seals. Create shard card for holder HOST. Content brief: Host receives container IDs with missing checksum bytes.. Ensure it can stand alone but becomes decisive when combined with other shards.. Subgenre: occult conspiracy. Tone: CINEMATIC. Immediate scene brief: Crown of Salt - Manifest Matrix - HOST Shard Card. Grounded cinematic horror, photoreal detail, rich atmosphere, practical lighting, believable materials, analog grain, subtle lens bloom, visible depth. Absolutely no visible letters, words, signage, subtitles, captions, runes, glyphs, pseudo-text, document copy, watermark, logo, title treatment, UI overlay, labels, poster typography, or debug text. Show a physical evidence-board or clue collage with photographs, string, maps, stained paper, and marked surfaces. Prioritize tactile realism over readable text. Do not render any legible handwriting, labels, map text, captions, dossier headings, or faux typography.
source_prompt: Story: Crown of Salt (crown-of-salt) | Hook: A relic-smuggling cartel launders artifacts through a city that disappears at dawn tide. | Subgenre: occult conspiracy | Tone: CINEMATIC | Location: Port authority archives and salt catacombs | Villain: The Salt Regent | Villain worldview: Order comes from controlled sin, not clean law. | Motifs: salt crowns, wet ledgers, cargo seals. Create shard card for holder HOST. Content brief: Host receives container IDs with missing checksum bytes.. Ensure it can stand alone but becomes decisive when combined with other shards.
